quality_levels.complete-semantic-contract: bounded argument-specific source or source-hash-guarded authored evidence passed M3 semantic checks
quality_levels.not-public: not a canonical public raw routine
quality_levels.semantic-review-required: one or more semantic checks failed or source evidence remains incomplete
